season.label: Shoulder / Early Green Season
season.crowd_level: Low — tourist crowds drop significantly in May
season.price_context: Villa and activities 20–30% cheaper than peak dry season (Dec–Apr)
season.notes: May marks the start of the rainy season in Guanacaste. Mornings typically sunny; afternoon showers possible but short. Playa Ocotal remains swimmable. Lush green landscapes.

issues.message: Private Catamaran (Day 3) not yet booked — estimated $2,000 total for 13 people

Diamante Animal Sanctuary (Day 5) not yet booked — estimated $770 for ~11 people
Maeve's birthday cake (Day 7) still needs to be arranged — estimated $75
Waterfall entrance fees (~$150 total) paid on-site — Llanos de Cortés ~$10–15/person, La Leona ~$20–30/person

Denver group arrives ~1h 40m after Charlotte group — single shared shuttle works, Charlotte group waits at LIR or heads to villa first

items.title: Charlotte Group Arrives — CLT → LIR
items.subtitle: 7 travelers: Brad, Allison, Bennett, Ela, Liam Scheu · Pat & Tom Miller
items.notes: Departs Charlotte 9:10 AM, arrives Liberia (LIR) 11:35 AM.

items.title: Denver Group Arrives — DEN → LIR
items.subtitle: 6 travelers: Scott, Courtney, Ava, Aspen, Maeve Miller · Jeff Miller
items.notes: Departs Denver 8:20 AM, arrives Liberia (LIR) 1:15 PM.

items.title: Private Shuttle — LIR → Malinche Palace
items.subtitle: Private Costa Rica Tours · +506 8950 3427 · All 13 travelers
items.notes: Both groups arrive within ~26 minutes of each other (11:35 & 13:15). One shared shuttle. $40/person × 13 = $520 total. CONFIRMED.

items.title: Check-In — Malinche Palace
items.subtitle: Playa Ocotal, Guanacaste · 6 bedrooms · +506 8851 5321
items.notes: Check-in 3:00 PM. Infinity pool, hot tub, movie room, ocean-view terrace. Bedroom allocation: Scheu family (2 rooms), Scott/Courtney/kids (2 rooms), Jeff Miller (1 room), Pat & Tom Miller (1 room).

items.title: Grocery Delivery Arrives
items.subtitle: Pre-arranged for 2:30 PM arrival

items.title: Unpack, Pool Time & Villa Exploration
items.notes: Infinity pool, hot tub, movie room, terraces. Allow young children and seniors to rest after travel.

items.title: Chef's Welcome Dinner at Villa
items.subtitle: Chef Gerson · WhatsApp: +506 8942 9530
items.notes: Chef Gerson provides most dinners and some breakfasts throughout the trip. Total chef cost: $3,350 for full trip.

items.title: Sunset from the Terrace
items.notes: Playa Ocotal faces west — excellent sunset views over the Pacific.

items.title: Ocotal Beach — Snorkeling, Tide Pools & Beach Play
items.subtitle: Walkable from villa · All ages · Free
items.notes: Tide pools great for Liam (5) and Aspen (7). Snorkeling for Bennett (11), Ela (10), Ava (10). Shallow calm areas safe for Maeve with supervision. Pat & Tom can enjoy beach chairs.

items.title: Lunch — Villa or Father Rooster Beach Bar
items.subtitle: Father Rooster is a local beach bar at Ocotal
items.notes: Option to eat back at villa or stay at the beach at Father Rooster — a popular local beach bar with cold drinks and casual food.

items.title: Afternoon — Infinity Pool, Hot Tub & Movie Room
items.notes: Villa amenities: infinity pool, hot tub, large movie room, ocean terrace.

items.title: Chef Dinner at Villa
items.subtitle: Chef Gerson

items.title: Early Breakfast — Scuba Divers Only
items.subtitle: Scott & Courtney Miller

items.title: Scuba Diving — Catalina & Bat Islands
items.subtitle: Scott & Courtney Miller only · 2-tank dive · Must bring dive certification cards
items.notes: TO BOOK. 2-tank dive at Catalina Islands or Bat Islands. Wildlife: manta rays, sharks, sea turtles, coral. Estimated $80–$150/person. Dive certification cards are REQUIRED — do not forget.

items.title: Morning Option — Villa Relax OR Quick Diamante Visit
items.subtitle: Non-divers · Optional · Sloths, jaguars, monkeys at Diamante · Flat paved paths
items.notes: Option A: Sleep in and relax at villa pool. Option B: Quick 2-hour visit to Diamante Animal Sanctuary (flat paths, stroller-friendly, great for kids and seniors). Must return by noon for catamaran.

items.title: Private Catamaran — All 13 People
items.subtitle: Departs Ocotal Beach (walkable from villa) · Snorkeling, paddleboards, food & drinks included
items.notes: TO BOOK. 4–5 hour private charter. All 13 travelers including Maeve and grandparents. Estimated $150–$200/person, ~$2,000 total. Includes: snorkeling gear, paddleboards, food, drinks, crew. Suitable for all ages and mobility levels — grandparents can relax on deck.

items.title: Chef Dinner at Villa
items.subtitle: Chef Gerson

days.label: Adventure Split Day — Choose Your Thrill

items.title: Option A — Zip Line at Diamante
items.subtitle: 1,360m Superman line · ~40 min drive · $88/person
items.notes: Diamante Eco Adventure Park's signature Superman zip line. Best for: Bennett (11), Ela (10), Ava (10), and all adults. CONFIRM age/weight minimums for Liam (5) and Aspen (7) before booking. Not recommended for Pat, Tom, or Maeve.

items.title: Option B — ATV Riding
items.subtitle: $90–$300/person · Children ride with adult · ~30–45 min drive
items.notes: Multiple operators in the Ocotal/Tamarindo area. Children typically must ride with an adult. Confirm age minimums.

items.title: Option C — Horseback Riding
items.subtitle: $50–$80/person · Ages 7+ with adult supervision
items.notes: Generally suitable for children 7+ with adult supervision. Aspen (7) should be confirmed with operator. Beach or jungle trail options available nearby.

items.title: Option D — Chill at Villa (Recommended for Pat, Tom & Maeve)
items.subtitle: Pool, beach, hot tub, movie room
items.notes: Strongly recommended for Pat (75), Tom (75), and Maeve (1). Also a good option for anyone who wants a relaxed day.

items.title: Lunch — Packed (Adventure Groups) or Villa (Chill Group)
Chef BBQ Night at Villa
items.subtitle: Chef Gerson — Full group reunites

items.title: Depart for Diamante Animal Sanctuary
items.subtitle: ~40 min drive from villa · Full group

items.title: Diamante Animal Sanctuary — Full Group
items.subtitle: Sloths · Jaguars · Monkeys · Tropical birds · Flat paved paths throughout
items.notes: TO BOOK. ~11 people (confirm count). $60–$70/person, ~$770 total. 2–3 hours on-site. Flat, paved paths — perfect accessibility for Pat, Tom, and stroller for Maeve. Educational and interactive for all ages. Wildlife: sloths, jaguars, monkeys, tropical birds, reptiles.

items.title: Lunch — At or Near Sanctuary
items.subtitle: Back at villa by ~1:30–2:00 PM

items.title: Chef Dinner at Villa
items.subtitle: Chef Gerson

items.title: Depart for Waterfalls
items.subtitle: Llanos de Cortés: ~45 min · La Leona: ~60 min

items.title: Option A — Llanos de Cortés Waterfall (EASY)
items.subtitle: 40-ft waterfall · 10–15 min walk · Safe shallow swimming pool · Picnic area & bathrooms
items.notes: EASY. ~45 min drive. $10–$15/person entrance. Short, well-maintained path to a stunning 40-ft waterfall with a wide, shallow pool perfect for all ages. Recommended for Pat, Tom, Maeve, Liam (5), and Aspen (7). Picnic area and bathroom facilities on-site.

items.title: Option B — La Leona Waterfall (MODERATE)
items.subtitle: 30–40 min hike · White sand beach at base · River swimming · Guide included
items.notes: MODERATE. ~60 min drive. $20–$30/person, guide included. 30–40 min hike through jungle to a waterfall with a white sand beach and river swimming at the base. Best for teens and adults. Suitable for Bennett (11), Ela (10), Ava (10). Stunning scenery.

items.title: Option C — Split Groups
items.subtitle: Easy group → Llanos de Cortés · Moderate group → La Leona · Reunite at villa for lunch
items.notes: Recommended split: Pat, Tom, Maeve, young children + caregivers go to Llanos de Cortés. Older kids and adults who want more adventure go to La Leona. Both groups meet back at villa ~1:00 PM. Packing list: swimsuits, towels, water shoes, waterproof bag, sunscreen, bug spray, light snacks.

items.title: Lunch — Packed or Back at Villa
Afternoon — Villa Pool & Rest
items.notes: Recovery time after morning activity. Pool, hot tub, movie room.

items.title: Chef Dinner at Villa
items.subtitle: Chef Gerson

items.title: Breakfast — Sleep In!
items.subtitle: Villa · Relaxed start

items.title: All Day — Villa Pool, Beach & Movie Room
items.subtitle: Free choice · Full rest day before departure
items.notes: Unstructured day. Pool, hot tub, beach walks, movie room. Great rest day for Pat & Tom before the long return flights tomorrow. Maeve is the guest of honor today!

items.title: Maeve's Birthday Dinner
items.subtitle: Chef Gerson at villa — Special birthday menu

items.title: Birthday Cake & Celebration — Maeve Turns 2!
items.subtitle: TO ARRANGE — Birthday cake · Estimated $75
items.notes: TO ARRANGE. Maeve Miller turns 2 today (born 2024-05-29). Order birthday cake in advance — ask Chef Gerson (+506 8942 9530) or a local bakery in Playas del Coco / Ocotal. Estimated $75.

items.title: Final Swim & Group Photos
items.notes: Last morning in paradise. Group photo at the villa and pool before packing up.

items.title: Charlotte Group Departs — Villa → LIR
items.subtitle: Brad, Allison, Bennett, Ela, Liam Scheu · Pat & Tom Miller · 7 travelers
items.notes: Depart villa 10:00 AM for Liberia Airport. Flight LIR → CLT departs 12:22 PM, arrives Charlotte 7:00 PM.

items.subtitle: Scott, Courtney, Ava, Aspen, Maeve Miller · Jeff Miller · 6 travelers
items.notes: Depart villa 10:30 AM for Liberia Airport. Flight LIR → DEN departs 1:05 PM, arrives Denver 6:40 PM.
